_README: skill-suggest-regressions.json — anchor pairs for ranking regression detection.
Each case asserts that a prompt MUST surface a specific skill as top-1 with
a score >= min_score. Run via:
we-forgectl skill-regressions
Exit code is non-zero if any case fails — wire into CI or tick.sh.
Calibration rules:
- min_score = ~65% of current baseline. Leaves room for marketplace IDF drift
without false-positive alarms, but catches a >35% degradation.
- Each case carries `baseline_score` for audit so future tuners see the gap
between asserted floor and what's observed today.
- When upstream marketplace changes shift baselines, edit min_score deliberately;
don't blanket-rebaseline — that defeats the purpose of regression detection.
Two languages, two roles each (covering both tokenization paths):
- 4 English-only prompts (control: ASCII tokenizer + IDF)
- 3 Korean+English mix prompts (mixed-path: Hangul tokenizer + synonym expand)
- 2 pure-Korean prompts (Korean-only: synonym expansion as sole bridge)
Marketplace history:
- 2026-05-15: ~410 skills, all from everything-claude-code + claude-plugins-official.
- 2026-05-16: 458 skills after knowledge-work-plugins added 205 new skills.
This dropped every term's IDF and introduced new domain neighbors. The
rebaseline this file captures was performed deliberately on 2026-05-16:
ko-postgres rebaselined (same top-1, lower score); ko-design-system
vendor-swapped to the new equal-domain winner; deploy-verify and
en-tdd-workflow left as documented known regressions awaiting a
description-override or non-suggestable-list fix (NOT a baseline fix).

cases.prompt: verify deployed URL endpoint SSE static asset
cases.notes: KNOWN REGRESSION 2026-05-16: knowledge-work-plugins:create-an-asset (a sales-asset generator) now wins top-1 because the prompt's 'asset' token matches it heavily; canary-watch dropped to #2 at 10.13. Score floor lowered from 15.0 to 8.0 so when the right fix lands (description override expansion OR demoting create-an-asset for non-sales contexts), the new IDF-shifted score still clears. expect_top intentionally NOT changed — the regression signal must persist until canary-watch is restored to top.
Stripe domain anchor — billing/refund/subscription must hit customer-billing-ops.
Lower min_score — short technical prompt, IDF doesn't pile up.

cases.prompt: markdown article writing blog post tutorial

cases.notes: KNOWN REGRESSION 2026-05-16: knowledge-work-plugins:deploy-checklist (pre-deploy verification checklist) now wins decisively at 32.27 because the prompt's '배포 / 검증' tokens map directly to its 'deploy / verify' description. canary-watch (post-deploy monitoring) was anchored here because the prompt's '모니터링 / 회귀' tokens lean toward post-deploy semantics, but the new neighbor outscores it. Two reasonable fixes — either (a) accept the new winner as also-valid and split this case into two anchors, or (b) tighten canary-watch's description override to weight post-deploy regression/monitoring more heavily. expect_top intentionally NOT changed for now to preserve the signal.
Mixed prompt — Korean tokens 결제/환불 plus English Stripe/구독→subscription synonym.

REBASED 2026-05-16: top-1 unchanged (postgres-patterns), but IDF shifted after the marketplace grew ~410 → 458 skills (knowledge-work-plugins added 205). Score dropped 22.25 → 12.15 with the same correct top-1. Pure floor recalibration — min_score 14.0 → 8.0, baseline_score 22.25 → 12.15. Synonym path (쿼리/최적화/인덱스 → query/optimization/index) is still wired correctly; this is purely a denominator effect from the larger skill corpus.

cases.prompt: test driven development write tests first then implement
cases.notes: KNOWN REGRESSION 2026-05-16: claude-plugins-official:hook-development now wins this prompt at 17.02 because 'hook' is unrelated but 'development' / 'implement' / 'test' tokens stack heavily in its description. tdd-workflow doesn't even appear in top-3 anymore. The 2026-05-15 description override (skill-description-overrides.json) was outscored by new marketplace entrants. Two reasonable fixes — (a) expand tdd-workflow override with more weight on 'red-green-refactor / TDD discipline / test-first methodology', or (b) narrow hook-development's description override to constrain its overreach into generic dev prompts. expect_top intentionally NOT changed to preserve the regression signal.

VENDOR REBASED 2026-05-16: expect_top changed from everything-claude-code:design-system → knowledge-work-plugins:design-system. Both skills share the exact same name and overlapping intent (audit / document / extend a design system); the new vendor's wording matches the prompt slightly better at 24.91 (ECC's was 32.32 with the override). This is a legitimate equal-domain duplicate — the anchor's purpose (verify the ko↔en synonym path 디자인/시스템 → design/system lands on a design-system skill) is preserved. If vendor preference becomes important, the lever is the non-suggestable list in build_ecc_index.py, not this anchor.
